name: 季沧海
bio: 活得快意，喝得尽兴，享受当下。醉勇之名背后，是一个对自由的渴望与对饮酒的热情同样强烈的男人。他不屈的精神在逆境中赋予他力量。
bio_en: Live fast, drink well, and be merry. Behind the name of the Loyal Drunk, there stands a man with a love for freedom as strong as his passion for drinking.
story: 季沧海，江湖中的醉勇，以酒为伴，以拳为剑。他对自由的渴望与对饮酒的热情同样强烈，不屈的精神在逆境中赋予他无尽的力量。前路充满艰辛，但无论多么艰难，他都会欣然面对。

skills.skill_description: 进入防御姿态，格挡伤害3秒，随后发动反击，使敌人燃烧5秒。冷却22秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Enter a defensive stance, blocking damage for 3s, then counter-attack and burn enemies for 5s. Cooldown: 22s.

skills.skill_description: 进入防御姿态格挡伤害5秒，反击伤害根据格挡量提升。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Block damage for 5s; counter-attack damage scales with damage blocked. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 击退附近敌人，进入强化状态32秒，攻击力大幅提升，部分攻击使敌人燃烧，同时提升友军能量恢复速度。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Repel nearby enemies and enter an empowered state for 32s, greatly boosting attack. Some attacks burn enemies. Allies recover energy faster. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 击退敌人，进入强化状态，攻击敌人时恢复怒气，同时提升友军攻击力30秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Repel enemies, enter empowered state, restore rage on hit, and boost allies' attack for 30s. Rage limit: 75000.
